prompt: Generate a screenshot of a digital receipt displaying various purchased goods. Use the clean, minimalist layout and high-contrast blue and white color palette from the reference image for this digital screen display.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a digital receipt displaying various purchased goods or services. Emulate the clean, minimalist layout and high-contrast black and white/grayscale color palette from image 1. The receipt should feature a company logo (similar to the 'Z' in a circle in image 1) and company address in the top-left. The title 'RECEIPT' and a receipt number (e.g., 'Receipt/#12') should be positioned in the top-right. Include a 'Bill To' section with a customer's name and address below the company information. Display an itemized table containing at least three distinct items or services, with columns titled '#', 'Item & Description', 'Qty', 'Rate', 'Tax', and 'Amount'. Below the itemized table, include summary lines for 'Sub Total', 'Tax' (e.g., 'Tax (12%)'), and 'Total', where the 'Total' line is visually distinct on a light background. Conclude the receipt with separate sections for 'Notes' and 'Terms & Conditions' positioned at the bottom.
objects: 'Bill To' section with customer name and address
Itemized table with column titles ('#', 'Item & Description', 'Qty', 'Rate', 'Tax', 'Amount')
At least three distinct items or services within the table
'Total' line (visually distinct on a light background)
